Mechanic's lien record
A mechanic's lien claims the property for unpaid work. In Kansas, you generally have 4 months from last day of work to file. Consult a KS attorney before filing.

Settings & rates
Dark mode
Easier on the eyes at night or in the truck
Update every January. IRS rate: irs.gov  ·  KS taxes: ksrevenue.gov

2025 = $0.700 · 2026 = TBD (update Jan)

Rates auto-fill when you select a state. You can override any value manually.

PNG, JPG, or SVG. Shown on the dark blue header of every proposal you send.

Checking Stripe status…
Estimator defaults
Labor rates ($/sq ft or flat) Set these to match what you actually charge
These are your base labor rates before scope add-ons. If a $2,500 job feels like it should show more profit, raise these to match your real pricing.
Walls rate is per room sq ft (L×W floor area) — calibrated to cover full wall labor across the room. Trim rate is per linear foot and reflects prep complexity (taping, sanding, filling, smooth finish). Scope add-ons (sand, spackle, primer, etc.) stack on top automatically. These defaults target Topeka, KS market at ~$1,200 for a full 11×11 dining room.

Danger zone
Use this to wipe all test data and start fresh. Cannot be undone.
Top Clients
Your highest-value clients — tap to open. Score = tier (A:30/B:20/C:10) + revenue + jobs won + recency. Realtors and PMs get +20 bonus. Higher score = call them first.
